title: How to close a sprint in Product Development Template?
excerpt: Experimenting with the Product Development template in Monday work management.  One thing I cannot figure out is how to close a sprint when it is complete.  Anyone have experience with how this is intended to work?  Than…

posts.author: ben.cardell (Ben Cardell)
posts.cookedHtml: Experimenting with the Product Development template in Monday work management. One thing I cannot figure out is how to close a sprint when it is complete. Anyone have experience with how this is intended to work? Thanks ahead of time!
